gas_elevated.excerpt: Sustained flammable/toxic gas accumulation shall trigger restricted work controls in adjacent areas until readings normalize and a competent person clears the zone.
gas_elevated.next_step: Restrict adjacent work and re-clear atmosphere before resuming.

hot_work_adjacent.excerpt: Hot work shall not proceed where flammable atmospheres may be present or where adjacent process upsets create ignition risk; permits must be suspended pending gas clearance.
hot_work_adjacent.next_step: Block / suspend the hot-work PTW until gas is independently cleared.

confined_space_entry.excerpt: Confined-space entry requires continuous monitoring of atmosphere and immediate abort if process deviations (pressure, toxins) develop near the entry point.
confined_space_entry.next_step: Abort entry, withdraw personnel, and hold the confined-space permit.

abnormal_atmosphere.excerpt: Abnormal pressure or toxic readings adjacent to manned entry shall be treated as an unsafe atmosphere until independently verified safe.
abnormal_atmosphere.next_step: Treat area as unsafe atmosphere; do not authorize entry work.

maint_on_gas_path.excerpt: Maintenance on gas-handling equipment requires isolation integrity and elevated detector vigilance; rising readings mandate stop-work and re-isolation checks.
maint_on_gas_path.next_step: Stop maintenance on the gas path and verify isolation integrity.

simops_conflict.excerpt: Where two or more permit types interact spatially, the more restrictive control applies until a named owner clears conflict.
simops_conflict.next_step: Freeze conflicting permits and escalate to the permit coordinator.
